title: Add a Complete Product
description: Insert a new product called "Sparkling Water" with a price of 2.49 into the products collection.
concept: When inserting documents, you can include as many fields as needed. Each field stores a value that can be a string, number, boolean, array, or nested object.
hint: Include name, price, and other fields: db.products.insertOne({name: "Sparkling Water", price: 2.49, category: "beverages"})
